A love story

One Swipe
Changed Everything

It started with a picture in a saree.
I didn't know then that I was looking at someone who would change my life.

scroll
Nov ember

We started talking.

One conversation became another.

Days became weeks.
Weeks became months.

Somewhere between all those messages, calls, laughter, and endless conversations —

you became the person I looked forward to every single day.

The girl I fell for

✨
Your smile
🌸
Your cuteness
💛
Your kindness
🤍
The way you care
🌩️
The way you get angry at me
☀️
The way you still make me smile

"The way you make everything feel better."

June

Our First
Meeting

After months of talking, waiting, and imagining that moment —

I finally got to meet you.

We talked. We walked. We laughed.
Hours felt like minutes.

The conversations, the silences, the little moments of just being there —
it was all I had imagined and more.

Some memories fade.
Nashik never will.

The conversations
Every little moment

you & me

My Safe Place

Life gets noisy.
Life gets difficult.

But somehow talking to you always felt easy.

You became my comfort place.

The person I wanted to tell everything.
The person I wanted beside me during my best days and my worst ones.

Distance never changed that.

🤍

what I should have said

"Three days ago, we stopped talking."

"I replayed every memory."

"Every conversation."

"Every laugh."

"Every fight."

And I realized something.

I was never unsure about you.

I was only too slow to say
what my heart already knew.

I Love You  ❤️

You are my today.

You are my tomorrow.

You are my forever.

Do You
Love Me Too?

You just made me the
happiest person alive ❤️

This is us. This is real. This is forever.

You are the first girl I have ever truly said
'I love you' to.

And deep in my heart, I hope you are the last.

I don't know how many miles separate us.
I don't know how many journeys still wait ahead.

But I know this —

I will wait for every meeting.
I will cherish every moment.
I will choose you again and again.

Because finding you was my favourite surprise.

— always yours ❤️
